2026-06-12ISEDTelecommunications ActOrder declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission for reconsideration Order declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) for reconsideration Telcom Decision CRTC 2025-157- Iristel Inc., thereby letting it stand.N/A
